response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR airline_code : varchar
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ATTR belt_number : varchar
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_hour : time

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar
ATTR airport_city : varchar

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_number, seat_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK

ENTITY Crew
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_number, license_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_license : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_departure
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=airport_arrival
REL Seat -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 0..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL CrewAssignment -> Crew : 0..N -> 1 : FK=license_number
